project: LimitsOfLearning — Lean4 Metaprogram for Formal Learning Theory

break_points.name: VCdim = WithTop N vs OrdinalVCdim = Ordinal
PAC measures vs Online adversaries (data interface)
Function-class to set-family bridge lossy
break_points.HC_source: internal to PAC, surfaces at Mathlib bridges

break_points.name: Five generalization bounds with different signatures
Bayesian prior has no canonical type

compilation_discovered_constraints.description: Σ is a Lean4 keyword (sigma type) — cannot use as variable name
compilation_discovered_constraints.impact: Renamed to Sym across Computation.lean and Process.lean (all automata/language types)
compilation_discovered_constraints.typing_consequence: None — pure naming constraint. No semantic loss.

compilation_discovered_constraints.description: ℝ≥0 (NNReal) notation requires explicit Mathlib import not transitively available
compilation_discovered_constraints.typing_consequence: Non-negativity constraint lost at type level. COUNTERDEFINITION OPPORTUNITY: BayesianInference with NNReal fields when Mathlib.Data.NNReal.Defs is imported.
compilation_discovered_constraints.HC_relevance: Freq/Bayes joint HC=0.7 — NNReal version is Bayesian-native, ℝ version is paradigm-neutral

compilation_discovered_constraints.description: def blocks typeclass synthesis — Lean4 won't unfold def for instance resolution
compilation_discovered_constraints.impact: Changed ConceptClass, HypothesisSpace, DriftRate from def to abbrev
compilation_discovered_constraints.typing_consequence: abbrev makes types transparent to Lean elaborator. Required for Set membership, LE/Zero instances. This is a Lean4-specific constraint with no mathematical content — pure substrate constraint.

compilation_discovered_constraints.description: TextPresentation(DataStream X Unit) incompatible with GoldLearner(List (X × Bool))
compilation_discovered_constraints.impact: Changed TextPresentation to extend DataStream X Bool with positive/correct/exhaustive fields
compilation_discovered_constraints.typing_consequence: Semantically equivalent — text is stream of (x, true) pairs. The Unit version was more elegant (label carries no info in text) but Lean4's type system requires matching. BP₃ data interface break partially manifests here: the data FORMAT is paradigm-specific.

compilation_discovered_constraints.description: Ordinal requires universe annotation in structure fields
compilation_discovered_constraints.typing_consequence: Fixes to countable ordinals (Ordinal.{0}). Learning theory ordinals ARE countable (< ω₁), so no semantic loss. But Path B might need higher ordinals for transfinite induction arguments.

gamma_ledger.invariance: types compile across paradigm modules — VERIFIED: lake build 0 errors, 69 sorry warnings, CI-enforced
gamma_ledger.completeness: 139/139 concept graph nodes have types + ERM added (140 total)
gamma_ledger.compilation_status: PASS — zero errors, only sorry warnings

gaps_closed.description: PACLearnable sorry-in-Prop — conclusion was trivially True
gaps_closed.fix: Replaced sorry with well-typed measure-theoretic statement: ∃ Dm probability measure on (Fin m → X × Bool), Dm{S | D{x | L(S)(x) ≠ c(x)} ≤ ε} ≥ 1-δ

gaps_closed.description: Trivially-true theorem conclusions (nfl, natarajan, computational_hardness, occam, advice, meta_pac, unlabeled, vcdim_hardness)
gaps_closed.fix: Replaced True conclusions with semantically correct statements: nfl uses ¬PACLearnable Set.univ, natarajan uses ¬(DSDim < ⊤), vcdim_hardness uses SQDimension = ⊤, occam uses consistency→PACLearnable, etc.
Replaced with 5-way conjunction (PAC↔VCDim, VCDim↔Compression, VCDim↔Rademacher→0, PAC→ERM, VCDim↔GrowthFunction) documenting BP₅
Removed [Fintype X] from VCDim, GrowthFunction, and all 15+ downstream theorems/bridges. Finset X provides finite subset supremum without Fintype.

gaps_closed.description: EXLearnable List.ofFn fragility (reconstructs list at each step)
gaps_closed.fix: Introduced dataUpTo helper using List.range.map. Applied uniformly across all Gold-style criteria (EX, BC, Finite, Vacillatory, Anomalous, Monotonic, TrialAndError).
Moved to Learner.lean (before BayesianLearner). Conceptually correct: Bayesian inference is a learning-theory primitive, not a computability concept.
Added noncomputable def ERM as BatchLearner in Complexity.lean after EmpiricalError. ERM is the canonical PAC learner — the constructive direction of the fundamental theorem.

meta_ledger.Coh_ens_Will: type architecture serves Path A Step (b) goal — COMPILED AND SEMANTICALLY STRENGTHENED
meta_ledger.Pl_imagine: 7 break points + 5 compilation constraints + 7 gaps closed for Path B

files.role: Break point documentation for Path B
